title: U.S. Strikes Kharg Island as Trump Raises Iran Threats to Apocalyptic Levels
summary_full: U.S. forces launched more than 90 “restrikes” on Kharg Island, Iran’s oil export hub, early on Tuesday but have avoided hitting oil infrastructure.
summary_public: U.S. forces launched more than 90 “restrikes” on Kharg Island, Iran’s oil export hub, early on Tuesday but have avoided hitting oil infrastructure.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: U.S. Strikes Kharg Island as Trump Raises Iran Threats to Apocalyptic Levels
